steps.title: Clear the denominators
steps.content:
The denominator factors as $x^2-25=(x-5)(x+5)$. Multiply both sides by $x^2-25$:
$$
25x=x(x+5)+20(x-5)
$$

steps.title: Choose the positive solution
steps.content: The equation gives $x=10$ or $x=-10$. The question asks for the positive solution. The answer is 10.
